CVE-2024-11287.title: Ebook Store <= 5.8001 - Reflected XSS via REQUEST_URI

CVE-2026-0996.title: Fluent Forms <= 6.1.14 - Subscriber+ Stored XSS via AI Form Builder

CVE-2025-68848.title: amr cron manager <= 2.3 - Unauthenticated Stored XSS

CVE-2020-12800.title: Drag and Drop Multiple File Upload CF7 <= 1.3.3.2 - Arbitrary File Upload

CVE-2025-2005.title: Front End Only Users <= 3.2.32 - Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload

CVE-2025-10147.title: Podlove Podcast Publisher <= 4.2.6 - Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload

CVE-2023-51410.title: WP Mail Log <= 1.1.2 - Contributor+ Arbitrary File Upload + Path Traversal

CVE-2024-8104.title: WP Extended <= 3.0.8 - Subscriber+ Arbitrary File Download via Path Traversal

CVE-2023-6972.title: Backup Migration <= 1.3.9 - Unauthenticated Path Traversal to File Deletion

CVE-2019-13635.title: WP Fastest Cache <= 0.8.9.5 - Unauthenticated Directory Traversal

CVE-2021-39312.title: True Ranker <= 2.2.2 - Unauthenticated File Read via Vendor File

CVE-2022-0320.title: Essential Addons for Elementor <= 5.0.4 - Unauthenticated LFI

CVE-2022-1392.title: Videos sync PDF <= 1.7.4 - Unauthenticated LFI via direct include

CVE-2024-49613.title: Simple Code Insert Shortcode <= 1.0 - Contributor+ SQL Injection (UNPATCHED)
CVE-2024-49613.notes: Abandoned plugin, no fix. Classic $atts['id'] into WHERE id=$id

CVE-2023-5428.title: Image Vertical Reel <= 9.0 - Contributor+ SQL Injection via Shortcode

CVE-2025-13673.title: Tutor LMS <= 3.9.6 - Unauthenticated SQL Injection via coupon_code
CVE-2025-13673.notes: Custom query builder with is_numeric?$val:'$val' antipattern. Fix adds prepare_value() helper.

CVE-2024-9186.title: FunnelKit Automations <= 3.2.2 - Unauthenticated SQL Injection via Cookie
CVE-2024-9186.notes: Cookie-based injection. Model class has systemic prepare missing across multiple methods.

CVE-2024-1071.title: Ultimate Member 2.1.3-2.8.2 - Unauthenticated SQL Injection via sorting
CVE-2024-1071.notes: Critical severity. Non-strict in_array allows fallthrough to ORDER BY injection. prepare() cannot fix ORDER BY - needs allowlist.

CVE-2024-6467.title: BookingPress <= 1.1.5 - Subscriber+ File Read to File Creation

CVE-2024-32830.title: BuddyForms <= 2.8.8 - Unauthenticated SSRF + Arbitrary File Read
CVE-2024-32830.notes: file_get_contents() replaced with wp_safe_remote_get(). Unauthenticated via AJAX.

CVE-2019-16932.title: Visualizer <= 3.3.0 - Unauthenticated Blind SSRF via REST API
CVE-2019-16932.notes: REST route /upload-data had no permission_callback. Fix added current_user_can('edit_posts') but no URL validation.

CVE-2024-23825.title: TablePress <= 2.2.4 - Author+ SSRF with DNS Rebinding Bypass
CVE-2024-23825.notes: Original checked hostname string against metadata IPs (DNS rebinding bypass). Fix resolves DNS first then checks IP. Added more cloud metadata IPs.

CVE-2023-6991.title: JSM file_get_contents() Shortcode <= 2.7.0 - Contributor+ SSRF via Shortcode
CVE-2023-6991.notes: Shortcode accepts URL attr from contributor post content. Fix added wp_http_validate_url().

CVE-2025-14478.title: Demo Importer Plus <= 2.0.9 - Author+ Blind XXE via SVG Upload
CVE-2025-14478.notes: simplexml_load_file() on SVG without entity protection. Fixed with DOMDocument + resolveExternals=false. PHP < 8.0 only.

CVE-2025-32138.title: Easy Google Maps <= 1.11.18 - Author+ XXE via LIBXML_NOENT
CVE-2025-32138.notes: LIBXML_NOENT enables entity substitution (name is misleading). Works on ALL PHP versions. Fix removed the flag and added resolveExternals=false.

CVE-2024-50442.title: Royal Elementor Addons <= 1.3.980 - Author+ XXE via SVG Sanitizer
CVE-2024-50442.notes: SVG sanitizer uses LIBXML_NOENT|LIBXML_DTDLOAD. The 'fix' in 1.3.981 only renames functions, still uses same dangerous flags. Incomplete fix.

CVE-2024-7627.title: Bit File Manager 6.0-6.5.5 - Unauthenticated RCE via Race Condition

CVE-2023-4642.title: kk Star Ratings <= 5.4.5 - Race Condition to Multiple User Voting

CVE-2023-6109.title: YOP Poll <= 6.5.26 - Race Condition to Vote Manipulation

CVE-2025-3530.title: WordPress Simple PayPal Shopping Cart <= 5.1.2 - Unauthenticated Price Manipulation

CVE-2025-3889.title: WordPress Simple PayPal Shopping Cart <= 5.1.3 - Negative Quantity IDOR

CVE-2025-11517.title: Event Tickets <= 5.26.5 - Unauthenticated Payment Bypass via Free Endpoint

CVE-2024-7747.title: Wallet for WooCommerce <= 1.5.6 - Numeric Type Confusion in Transfer

CVE-2024-6845.title: Chatbot with ChatGPT <= 2.4.5 - Unauthenticated OpenAI API Key Exposure

CVE-2025-11504.title: Quickcreator 0.0.9-0.1.17 - Unauthenticated API Key Exposure via Debug File
CVE-2025-11504.notes: Partial fix: removed public file write but admin debug page still shows API key in plaintext.

CVE-2024-22294.title: IP2Location Country Blocker <= 2.33.3 - Predictable Debug Log Filename

CVE-2024-2302.title: Easy Digital Downloads <= 3.2.9 - Debug Log via Directory Listing

CVE-2021-39327.title: BulletProof Security <= 5.1 - Backup Path Disclosure in Log File

CVE-2024-22284.title: Asgaros Forum <= 2.7.2 - Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection via Cookie

CVE-2024-10913.title: Clone <= 2.4.6 - Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection via recursive_unserialize

CVE-2024-38759.title: Search & Replace <= 3.2.2 - Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection

CVE-2024-10957.title: UpdraftPlus 1.23.8-1.24.11 - Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection
CVE-2024-10957.notes: Used Brumann polyfill for PHP <7.0 allowed_classes support

CVE-2024-5085.title: Hash Form <= 1.1.0 - Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection via Form Entry
CVE-2024-5085.notes: Best fix pattern -- custom array-only serialized string parser avoiding unserialize() entirely

CVE-2023-26326.title: BuddyForms <= 2.7.7 - PHAR Deserialization via Image URL

CVE-2024-24934.title: Elementor <= 3.19.0 - Contributor+ PHAR Deserialization + File Deletion
CVE-2024-24934.notes: Model fix: realpath() + temp dir containment + is_uploaded_file() validation

CVE-2023-25701.title: WatchTowerHQ <= 3.6.16 - Type Juggling Auth Bypass in check_ota

CVE-2023-6875.title: POST SMTP <= 2.8.7 - Type Juggling Auth Bypass via connect-app API
CVE-2023-6875.notes: Attack chain: bypass auth -> register FCM token -> intercept password reset emails -> admin takeover

CVE-2021-25074.title: WebP Converter for Media <= 4.0.2 - Unauthenticated Open Redirect
CVE-2021-25074.notes: Standalone PHP file outside WP routing. header('Location:') with $_GET['src']. Fix adds host + extension validation.

CVE-2024-8761.title: Share This Image <= 2.03 - Open Redirect via Stored URL
CVE-2024-8761.notes: Two-stage: store URL via nopriv AJAX, redirect via shortlink. Fix: wp_redirect -> wp_safe_redirect.

CVE-2024-0250.title: Analytics Insights <= 6.2 - Open Redirect via OAuth Callback
CVE-2024-0250.notes: Standalone OAuth callback file using $_GET['state'] as redirect URL. Fix: deleted file, nonce-based state.

CVE-2023-51675.title: Advanced Access Manager <= 6.9.18 - Authenticated Open Redirect
CVE-2023-51675.notes: Two vectors: login redirect settings + REST API auth redirect param. Fix: wp_validate_redirect() on both.

CVE-2025-6238.title: AI Engine == 2.8.4 - Insecure OAuth redirect_uri
CVE-2025-6238.notes: Full OAuth with unvalidated redirect_uri leaks auth code. Fix: disabled entire OAuth class. wp_safe_redirect wrong fix for OAuth.

CVE-2021-25111.title: English WordPress Admin <= 1.5.1.1 - Unauthenticated Open Redirect
CVE-2021-25111.notes: Incomplete fix: added nonce check but no URL validation. Still redirectable with valid nonce.

CVE-2025-2303.title: Block Logic <= 1.0.8 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Remote Code Execution via eval()
CVE-2025-2303.notes: blockLogic attribute passed directly to eval(). Fix: complete rewrite with custom tokenizer/parser and function allowlist.

CVE-2024-8512.title: W3SPEEDSTER <= 7.26 - Authenticated (Administrator+) Remote Code Execution via eval()
CVE-2024-8512.notes: safe_eval() with regex-based function allowlist is bypassable (variable functions, backticks). Fix: removed entire AJAX endpoint + eval functions.

CVE-2011-10033.title: is-human <= 1.4.2 - Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution via eval()
CVE-2011-10033.notes: Direct $_GET['type'] into eval() string concat. No auth, direct file access. Unpatched/abandoned.

CVE-2025-13035.title: Code Snippets <= 3.9.1 - Authenticated (Contributor+) PHP Code Injection via extract()
CVE-2025-13035.notes: extract() without EXTR_SKIP before eval() allows overwriting $snippet or $filepath vars. Fix: EXTR_SKIP flag.

CVE-2025-9321.title: WPCasa <= 1.4.1 - Unauthenticated Code Injection via Dynamic Class Instantiation
CVE-2025-9321.notes: class_exists() + new $api() from query var. Also do_action() with user-controlled suffix. Fix: empty allowlist with apply_filters.

CVE-2025-10057.title: WP Import CSV/XML 7.20-7.28 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) RCE via PHP File Write + Require
CVE-2025-10057.notes: User CSV data written to customFunction.php (chmod 0777) then require_once'd. Fix: JSON storage, 0644 perms, capability check.

CVE-2024-9593.title: Time Clock <= 1.2.2 - Unauthenticated RCE via call_user_func($_POST['function'])
CVE-2024-9593.notes: function_exists() guard is not a security check -- returns true for all PHP builtins. wp_ajax_nopriv_ makes it unauthenticated. Fix: entire endpoint removed.

CVE-2023-6634.title: LearnPress <= 4.2.5.7 - Unauthenticated Command Injection via call_user_func
CVE-2023-6634.notes: REST route with __return_true permission_callback accepts {class,method} from user input. call_user_func([$class,$method],$args). Fix: allowlist filter.

CVE-2025-9334.title: Better Find and Replace <= 1.7.7 - Subscriber+ Code Injection via Dynamic Dispatch
CVE-2025-9334.notes: User 'method' param split by @ into class+method. Namespace prefix not a security boundary. Fix: hardcoded allowlist with per-method capability checks.

CVE-2020-11928.title: Media Library Assistant <= 2.81 - Unauthenticated RCE via create_function() in Shortcode
CVE-2020-11928.notes: create_function('','return '.$value.';') on tax_query/meta_query/date_query shortcode attrs. 3x identical patterns. Fix: _validate_array_specification() structural parser.

CVE-2025-8723.title: Cloudflare Image Resizing <= 1.5.6 - Unauthenticated RCE via PHP Config File Injection
CVE-2025-8723.notes: rest_pre_dispatch hook fires BEFORE WP auth. preg_replace writes user input into PHP define() statements in config.php. Fix: removed entire hook, admin_init only.

CVE-2024-4704.title: Contact Form 7 <= 5.9.4 - Unauthenticated Open Redirect via Protocol-Relative URL
CVE-2024-4704.notes: Not a server redirect -- form action attribute set to //evil.com via add_query_arg(). Fix: ltrim + str_starts_with validation. 5M+ installs.

CVE-2026-1296.title: Frontend Post Submission Manager Lite <= 1.2.7 - Unauthenticated Open Redirect
CVE-2026-1296.notes: 6 wp_redirect() calls across login handlers, all with esc_url() false sense of security. Fix: all changed to wp_safe_redirect().

CVE-2024-5021.reason: No patch available (abandoned plugin, no tag beyond vulnerable 3.0.1)

CVE-2025-31039.reason: Fix in 1.0.3 is XSS sanitization (esc_attr), not XXE fix. Mislabeled CVE.

CVE-2018-19370.reason: Yoast SEO tags pre-9.2 no longer available on SVN (purged). Cannot diff.

CVE-2024-7503.reason: Plugin removed from wordpress.org SVN. Cannot diff.

CVE-2014-8877.reason: create_function() CVE from 2014. Tags only available from 2.9.6+, vulnerable version 2.0.3 not on SVN.

CVE-2024-7094.reason: Described as 'code injection via storeTheme' but fix is adding current_user_can() check -- primarily auth bypass, not code injection pattern.

patterns_covered: missing current_user_can() on AJAX handlers
missing wp_verify_nonce() on form/AJAX handlers
nonce leakage to low-privilege users
privilege escalation via arbitrary options update
privilege escalation via database string replacement
framework-level shared vulnerability across plugins
shortcode attribute injection into JS/HTML without escaping
SVG file upload enabling stored XSS via script tags in XML
reflected XSS via raw $_SERVER[REQUEST_URI] and add_query_arg()
AI/LLM-generated content bypassing tag-based sanitization
unescaped admin page output of user-influenced data
client-controlled allowed-type list bypass
missing file type validation on registration form
content-only check without extension validation
REST API upload without type checking
path traversal via filename parameter in download handler
path traversal via unlink without realpath validation
URL-decoded cache path traversal
bundled vendor file with regex bypass for file read
LFI via include without realpath in Elementor widget AJAX
LFI via template/style parameter without allowlist
LFI via direct include of GET parameter in vendor file
CSS/LESS compiler output file creation without extension validation
image copy/download without file type validation on destination
file write with user-controlled path/name
shortcode attribute directly concatenated into WHERE clause
custom query builder wrapping values in quotes without prepare()
cookie value interpolated into tracking model SQL queries
abandoned plugin with no fix available
ORDER BY injection via non-strict in_array bypass (cannot use prepare)
edge_cases: CVE-2025-13673 (custom query builder with is_numeric pattern)
CVE-2024-9186 (cookie-based injection, not POST/GET)
CVE-2024-49613 (abandoned plugin, permanent vulnerability)

patterns_covered: file_get_contents() with user-controlled URL (unauthenticated)
REST API route without permission_callback fetching user URL
hostname-based metadata IP blocklist bypassed via DNS rebinding
shortcode URL attribute triggering server-side fetch
wp_remote_get() without wp_http_validate_url()
esc_url_raw() mistaken for SSRF protection (only sanitizes format)
edge_cases: CVE-2024-23825 (DNS rebinding bypass of hostname blocklist, TOCTOU on DNS resolution)

patterns_covered: simplexml_load_file() on uploaded SVG without entity protection
DOMDocument::loadXML() with LIBXML_NOENT flag (enables entity substitution)
SVG sanitizer that uses dangerous libxml flags
LIBXML_NOENT misunderstood as 'no entities' when it means 'substitute entities'
PHP 8.0+ default protection bypassed by LIBXML_NOENT flag
edge_cases: CVE-2025-32138 (LIBXML_NOENT bypasses PHP 8.0 default entity protection)
CVE-2024-50442 (incomplete fix: renamed functions but kept dangerous flags)

patterns_covered: TOCTOU temp file in web-accessible directory (predictable path, race to execute before unlink)
database race condition in voting/rating check-then-act without locking
transient-based mutex lock fix (kk Star Ratings approach)
MySQL LOCK TABLES fix (YOP Poll approach)
tmpfile() fix for temp file race (Bit File Manager approach)
edge_cases: CVE-2018-19370 (Yoast SEO ZIP extraction TOCTOU, tags purged from SVN)
CVE-2025-13646 (Modula ZIP extraction race, file type validation after extract)
Transient-based locks themselves have a narrow race (get_transient + set_transient not atomic)

patterns_covered: client-side price in hidden form fields with hash parameter mismatch
free order REST endpoint without cart total validation
negative quantity allowing price subtraction
numeric type confusion in wallet transfer with missing self-transfer check
client-side-only payment verification without server-to-server gateway check
booking price accepted from POST without server-side service price lookup
edge_cases: CVE-2025-3889 (negative quantity in same plugin that had price manipulation, chained vulns)
CVE-2024-7747 (self-transfer to create funds via rounding/conversion)
Currency/locale manipulation (decimal separator differences affecting floatval)

patterns_covered: maybe_unserialize() on cookie data (unauthenticated)
recursive_unserialize_replace() without allowed_classes (systemic in backup/migration plugins)
maybe_unserialize() on form entry values stored in DB
phar:// stream wrapper in file operation with user-controlled URL
phar:// in file deletion (unlink) with user-controlled path
loose comparison (==) of API tokens in REST permission callbacks
loose comparison of authentication nonce with expired transient
type juggling via JSON-decoded integer 0 matching false/null
edge_cases: CVE-2025-22777 (double URL-encoded serialized payloads bypassing sanitization)
DateTime exclusion bypass via O:+8 syntax
PHP 8.0 changed 0=='string' to false but null/false loose comparisons persist
PHAR polyglot files disguised as images
Nested stream wrappers (compress.zlib://phar://) bypassing simple phar:// checks

patterns_covered: REST endpoint with __return_true returning API keys/secrets
debug file_put_contents dumping tokens to web-accessible directory
predictable debug log filename using only public data in hash
debug log in unprotected uploads directory (directory listing)
backup job log exposing server paths and download URLs
phpinfo() exposure via IP spoofing or bundled phpinfo.php
edge_cases: CVE-2025-11504 (partial fix: removed public file but admin debug page still shows API key)
CVE-2024-10588 (Debug Tool: phpinfo via nopriv AJAX only when WP_DEBUG enabled)
CVE-2025-12039 (phpinfo gated by IP check using spoofable X-Forwarded-For)

patterns_covered: eval() on block/widget attributes (Contributor+ stored in post content)
eval() via AJAX with broken regex-based function allowlist
eval() on direct GET parameter in standalone PHP file (unauth)
extract() without EXTR_SKIP overwriting variables consumed by eval()
dynamic class instantiation from query var (new $class())
user PHP code written to .php file then require_once'd
do_action() with user-controlled suffix for hook injection
call_user_func($_POST['function']) with function_exists() guard (nopriv AJAX)
call_user_func([$class,$method],$args) via unauthenticated REST (__return_true)
dynamic dispatch (new $class)->$method($data) with namespace prefix as false security
create_function() on shortcode tax_query/meta_query/date_query attributes
preg_replace writing user input into PHP define() statements in config file
edge_cases: CVE-2024-8512 (safe_eval with regex allowlist bypassed via variable functions, backticks)
CVE-2025-13035 (extract+eval combo: eval'd code is trusted but extract overwrites its variables)
Admin-only eval() still critical on multisite (CVSS 9.1 for W3SPEEDSTER)
Autoloader-triggered file inclusion via class_exists() with user-controlled class name
CVE-2020-11928 (create_function is eval in disguise, 3x identical patterns in one file)
CVE-2025-8723 (rest_pre_dispatch fires before WP auth -- preg_replace into PHP config is stealth RCE)
function_exists() is not a security check for call_user_func (true for all builtins)
Namespace prefix on dynamic dispatch is naming convention, not security boundary

patterns_covered: header('Location:') in standalone PHP file with $_GET parameter
wp_redirect() with database-stored URL (two-stage via nopriv AJAX)
OAuth state parameter misused as redirect URL in standalone callback
wp_redirect() with user-controlled redirect param without wp_validate_redirect()
OAuth redirect_uri without client registration (auth code theft)
wp_redirect() with $_GET return URL without validation (nonce-only fix)
Form action URL via add_query_arg() protocol-relative injection (//evil.com)
Systemic wp_redirect() across login handlers with esc_url() false security
edge_cases: CVE-2025-6238 (OAuth redirect_uri cannot use wp_safe_redirect -- needs client registration whitelist)
CVE-2021-25111 (incomplete fix: nonce check added but URL still not validated)
CVE-2024-0250 (FILTER_SANITIZE_URL provides zero security against external redirects)
CVE-2024-4704 (protocol-relative URL //evil.com via add_query_arg, not a server redirect but form action injection, 5M+ installs)
CVE-2026-1296 (esc_url() before wp_redirect() provides zero redirect protection, common false pattern)
